resultList.dtldesc: This exceptional multi-storey apartment offers a premier residential experience within the esteemed Godrej Palmgrove project in Chembarambakkam. Designed to harmonise luxury with natural beauty, this residence provides a tranquil lifestyle with spectacular views of the nearby lake, making it an ideal choice for families seeking a sophisticated home in Western Chennai.::::Property Specifications::::This spacious 3 BHK apartment encompasses a substantial super built-up area of 1,427 sq. ft and is positioned on the 18th floor of a 19-storey tower. The elevated position ensures breathtaking, unobstructed views of the Chembarambakkam Lake and the surrounding greenery, while also providing excellent natural light and cross-ventilation. The internal layout is meticulously planned to include three well-proportioned bedrooms, three modern bathrooms, and two private balconies that further enhance the sense of space. As a fully furnished resale unit, the property is equipped with essential appliances, including two air conditioners, a washing machine, and a television. The interior is finished with high-quality vitrified tile flooring, and the east-facing orientation adheres to traditional principles for a bright and positive living environment.::::Facilities::::Residents of this gated community have access to an extensive array of world-class facilities designed for a holistic lifestyle. The property includes one dedicated covered parking space. Essential services are well-covered with 24-hour security, intercom facilities, a reliable power backup system, and a consistent piped gas connection. For recreation and wellness, the project features a grand clubhouse, a swimming pool, a fully equipped gymnasium, and dedicated courts for squash, badminton, and tennis. The community also offers a banquet hall, a meditation area, an internet/Wi-Fi connectivity zone, and a retail boulevard with shops for daily needs.::::Locality::::Strategically located in Chembarambakkam, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to the city’s major commercial and educational hubs. The neighbourhood is home to reputable institutions such as the Sree Sastha Institute of Engineering and Technology, which is just 1.2 km away. Healthcare and entertainment options are abundant, with the EVP Carnival Cinemas and various shopping centres within a 1 km radius. The area is well-served by public transport, with the L&T Bus Stop nearby, providing easy access to the Chennai-Bangalore Highway. This prime location perfectly balances the serenity of lakeside living with the convenience of a well-established urban infrastructure, ensuring all lifestyle requirements are met within the immediate vicinity.

resultList.dtldesc: Positioned in the fast-developing residential hub of Gowriwakkam, Chennai, this well-planned 2 BHK apartment offers a promising opportunity for homebuyers seeking a modern living space with future growth potential. With its strategic location, upcoming infrastructure, and thoughtfully designed layout, the property is ideal for both end-users and investors looking for a home in a thriving neighbourhood.::Property Specifications::Situated on the 1st floor of a low-rise building with a total of 3 floors, this under-construction apartment features a carpet area of 680 sq. ft, designed to maximise space efficiency. The home comprises two bedrooms and two bathrooms, catering comfortably to small families. A separate living and dining area ensures functional zoning within the apartment, while the kitchen is planned in a modular format with provision for a chimney, allowing for easy customisation. The apartment also includes a balcony overlooking the main road, providing natural light and ventilation, along with an additional servant room that adds to its practicality. Flooring is finished with a combination of granite and vitrified tiles, offering both durability and a refined appearance. The property is vaastu compliant and faces the north-west direction, contributing to a well-balanced living environment.::Facilities::The apartment is equipped with essential amenities that enhance daily comfort and convenience. Residents benefit from 24-hour water supply and reliable power backup, ensuring uninterrupted living. The building includes lift access for ease of movement and features security services along with CCTV surveillance for added safety. A dedicated covered parking space is provided, along with reserved parking facilities within the premises. The overall infrastructure is designed to support a secure and hassle-free lifestyle.::Locality::Located in Gowriwakkam, the property enjoys good connectivity to key parts of Chennai, making it a desirable residential choice. Essential facilities such as schools, including Vyom Education School, along with hospitals, supermarkets, and daily convenience stores are situated within a short distance of approximately 1–2 km. The area also offers smooth access to major road networks and public transport options, ensuring easy commuting. Chennai International Airport is reachable within a reasonable travel time of around 20–25 minutes, further enhancing connectivity. With its growing infrastructure and accessibility, this locality continues to attract homebuyers seeking long-term value and convenience.

resultList.dtldesc: Property DetailsThis independent house located in Urapakkam Chennai is available for sale and offers a peaceful residential environment with good connectivity to important areas of the city. Built on an 1800 sqft plot with a built up area of 800 sqft the property is an own construction completed around 20 years ago and maintained in strong condition for long term use. The house is situated on the ground floor only with no first floor construction making it suitable for senior citizens and families seeking convenient single level living. The property is located near M R Villas on Saradha Devi Street and enjoys easy access to public transport and essential facilities.Property SpecificationsThe house includes 1 bedroom 1 spacious hall and a kitchen measuring approximately 150 sqft. The property is unfurnished allowing buyers to customize the interiors according to their preferences. The flooring throughout the house is finished with tiles and all rooms have the same flooring pattern. Doors and windows are made of premium branded Australian Vengai wood which is rare and adds lasting durability and elegance to the property. The kitchen is designed in a traditional style with a granite platform and stainless steel sink. There is no piped gas connection available. The property includes one common bathroom and one separate Indian style toilet. The house is vastu compliant and south facing. Electrical fittings including lights and fans are installed throughout the property.FacilityThe property offers open car parking space and a comfortable independent living setup with privacy and peaceful surroundings. As the house is located entirely on the ground floor there are no balconies or upper floor structures. Access to the property is through an external staircase arrangement. The house does not include power backup or additional furnishing which gives buyers flexibility for future upgrades and interior planning. The spacious land area also offers scope for further development or renovation according to individual requirements.LocalityThe property is situated in Urapakkam Chennai which is a rapidly developing residential area with excellent public transport connectivity. Urapakkam Railway Station is within walkable distance and the famous Kelambakkam Bus Stand is also located nearby making daily commuting highly convenient. Reputed educational institutions including Sankara School run by Kanchi Mutt and other schools are easily accessible from the property. Shopping malls markets hospitals and branded retail outlets are developing quickly in the surrounding area which adds strong future value to the locality. The well connected location and growing infrastructure make this property an excellent option for both residential use and long term investment.
